meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for general-governance — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load all cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep pattern. On hit, read full DB entry via read_file(card.ref, startLine=card.lines[0], endLine=card.lines[1]).
